description: Composition Black track pants made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, with a broad elasticated waistband and drawstring on the inseam, two insert pockets on the sides with white tipping, two white panels on the upper sides of the pant and the hem, one zippered pocket at the back, inner mesh and appliqued branding below the left pocket Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with lukewarm water Do not bleach, or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron Do not iron on decorations Soft on the inside and sporty on the outside, these pants from puma make a great addition to your casual wardrobe. Crafted from a cotton/polyester blend, these pants are ideal for your Sports training, jogging sessions or just laid back weekends. The sporty look does wonders for your casual style and the soft fabric keeps you extremely comfy. Pair this with a sporty T-shirt and running shoes. Model Statistics Model is a size M of height 6' and waist 28"
